metric_caveats: Cap-25 validation slice with local Qwen3.6:35b; not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
S1 fields only: diagnosis, seizure_type, annotated_medication.
Two extraction calls per record route diagnosis from v4.10 and seizure/medication from v4.11; scorer semantics are unchanged.
Annotated-medication non-ASM/brand guard is applied post prediction.
Proceed to full validation only if cap-25 micro F1 is above the S2 clean-ladder Qwen full headline and cross-family metrics do not show a new regression.
